description: Address review findings: fix spurious double-load on first connect and remove duplicate offline/online toast handler.
steps: 1. In web/js/core/store.js, change the SSE 'open' handler to only emit('reconnected') when store.online was previously false (actual reconnect, not first connect).
2. In web/js/app.js wireGlobalEvents(), remove the on('online', ...) handler that shows toasts for connect/disconnect since the persistent banner now handles this.
acceptance_criteria: store.js only emits 'reconnected' on actual reconnects (not on first SSE open)
app.js wireGlobalEvents() no longer has on('online', ...) toast handler
verification: Run `npm test` from /projects/sandbox/HORRORGETICON-OPS and confirm all tests pass
findings: Both review issues fixed. store.js now checks wasOffline before emitting 'reconnected', preventing double-load on boot. Toast handler removed from wireGlobalEvents since offline-banner.js already handles connection status UI. All 182 tests pass.
